decision: Record exact source-authored view and dimension-station pixels as registration evidence, lock only source-proven semantic correspondences, and preserve unproved physical correspondence as blocked.

panel_normal_owner_ids.scope: panel frame only; not individual physical facets

blocked_physical_correspondence.subject: C-001 front-left/front-right/back-left/back-right physical corner or exterior seam pixels
blocked_physical_correspondence.reason: Silhouette-side similarity does not prove a shared physical corner on the irregular source object.

blocked_physical_correspondence.subject: Individual C-002 and C-003 masonry divisions across views
blocked_physical_correspondence.reason: Visible divisions do not prove hidden interfaces or cross-view stone identity.

blocked_physical_correspondence.subject: Individual C-004 peripheral small-form identity across views
blocked_physical_correspondence.reason: Occlusion prevents exact one-to-one cross-view identity.

blocked_physical_correspondence.subject: C-005 motif correspondence outside front and top
blocked_physical_correspondence.reason: Absence, occlusion, representation, and physical identity are unproved.

blocked_physical_correspondence.subject: C-006 and C-007 individual line-feature identity across views
blocked_physical_correspondence.reason: Similar line appearance is not calibrated physical correspondence.

blocked_physical_correspondence.subject: Individual physical facet normal owners
blocked_physical_correspondence.reason: Panel normal owners lock only the orthographic frame; they do not solve irregular facet normals.

blocked_physical_correspondence.subject: Numeric component centers, contact centers, origin, pivot, and centerline
blocked_physical_correspondence.reason: Step 05 locks authority types only; numeric values require approved formula-derived measurements.

flamestrike_output_approval.scope: Forty-six exact source registration marks, semantic station/span correspondence IDs, panel normal-owner frame records, contact-relation preservation, and seven blocked physical-correspondence categories.
